title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports payment failure while checking out. Transaction shows pending but order was not placed.

title: Order Not Delivered
description: Customer claims their order has not been delivered even though tracking shows completed.

title: Refund Request for Cancelled Order
description: Customer cancelled the order but has not received their refund yet.

title: App Crashing on Startup
description: Customer reports that the mobile application crashes immediately after opening.

title: Unable to Update Profile Information
description: Customer cannot update their phone number and address from account settings.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Customer tried applying a promotional code but the system shows it as invalid.

title: Account Suspended Without Notice
description: Customer's account has been suspended and they did not receive any prior notification.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer states that they were charged twice for a single subscription renewal.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation and promotional emails.

title: Feature Request - Dark Mode
description: Customer suggested adding a dark mode option in the application settings.

title: Slow Website Loading Speed
description: Customer reports that pages take too long to load, especially during checkout.
